nl_query: Which legal holds have been released in the last 30 days?
failed_sql:
SELECT sh.id, sh.script_id, a.urn, sh.case_id, sh.hold_reason, sh.hold_start_date, sh.hold_end_date, au.display_name AS placed_by, au.approved_by AS approved_by, sh.released_at, sh.is_active
FROM   script_hold sh
JOIN   answer_script a ON a.id = sh.script_id
JOIN   app_user      au ON au.id = sh.applied_by
WHERE  sh.is_active   = TRUE
  AND  sh.released_at IS NOT NULL
  AND  sh.released_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
ORDER  BY sh.released_at DESC
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): app_user.approved_by. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
